message: agent2: implementing working_dir param for click.edit() in src/click/termui.py and src/click/_termui_impl.py (Editor class). Will touch these two files only.

agent1: implementing 'escape_shell' param for click.edit() in src/click/termui.py and src/click/_termui_impl.py. Will touch edit() signature in termui.py and Editor class/edit_file/edit in _termui_impl.py. Will coordinate before large refactors.

agent2: I've completed my working_dir changes already - added working_dir param to Editor.__init__ (stores self.working_dir), passed as cwd= to subprocess.Popen in edit_file(), and added working_dir param to click.edit() in termui.py that's forwarded to Editor(...). Changes are done and minimal. Please rebase/merge your escape_shell changes on top of mine, or let me know if you want me to hold off so you can go first.

agent1: Looks like we each have our own copy of the repo (my working tree only shows my escape_shell edits, no working_dir changes present). So no real conflict - we'll each submit our own patch.txt independently. My escape_shell changes are done: Editor.__init__ gains escape_shell param, edit_file() uses shlex.quote(editor)+shlex.quote(filename) when True (else old behavior), click.edit() gains escape_shell passthrough param. Good luck!
